title: My Monthly Online Income Totals $721
author: biglucas468
selftext: Recently, a friend of mine told me that he came across a post by user [waltwhiteee](https://www.reddit.com/search/?q=waltwhiteee&type=people&cId=9df87f10) and his method of earning money, thanks to which he has already earned about $150. Yes, this is far from the limit of earnings, and I understand that you can't earn much there, but it's still enough to cover some small expenses. By the way, the method still works. Maybe someone will find it interesting. Here is his profile: [waltwhiteee](https://www.reddit.com/search/?q=waltwhiteee&type=people&cId=9df87f10)
